name: CHEVRON CORP
summary: Chevron Corporation is a Delaware-incorporated integrated energy company managing upstream and downstream operations globally. Upstream activities include exploring, developing, and producing crude oil and natural gas, LNG processing and transportation, carbon capture and storage, and gas-to-liquids. Downstream activities include refining crude oil into petroleum products, marketing fuels and lubricants, manufacturing renewable fuels, and producing commodity petrochemicals and plastics.

products.name: Crude Oil
products.description: Explored, developed, produced and transported crude oil globally through consolidated and affiliated operations.

products.name: Natural Gas
products.description: Produced, transported, stored and marketed natural gas including LNG processing and regasification.

products.name: Petroleum Products
products.description: Refined crude oil into fuels and lubricants marketed globally via pipeline, marine, motor and rail.

products.name: Renewable Fuels
products.description: Manufactured and marketed renewable fuels as part of downstream operations.

products.name: Petrochemicals and Plastics
products.description: Manufactured and marketed commodity petrochemicals, plastics for industrial uses, and fuel and lubricant additives.

products.name: Liquefied Natural Gas (LNG)
products.description: Processed, liquefied, transported and regasified LNG through upstream operations.

products.name: Carbon Capture and Storage
products.description: Engaged in carbon capture and storage as part of upstream lower carbon energy activities.

products.name: Gas-to-Liquids
products.description: Operated a gas-to-liquids plant as part of upstream operations.
